name: list_notes_assignments
description: Fetch notes from Box and return their text so action items / tasks assigned to people can be extracted. Use this when the user asks who is assigned what, what's on someone's plate, or for the action items / to-dos from a set of notes. Optionally narrow to one person.

notes.description: Box file ID (digits only), exact file name, keywords, or a folder name identifying the notes.

person.description: Optional. A person's name to filter assignments to. Omit to list assignments for everyone.
